sentences.arabic: يَعْمَلُ بَاسِلٌ حَارِسًا فِي مَبْنًى كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Basil radi kao čuvar u veliku zgradi.
sentences.translationEn: Basil works as a guard in a large building.

sentences.arabic: يَبْدَأُ دَوَامُهُ فِي الثَّامِنَةِ مَسَاءً وَيَنْتَهِي فِي الصَّبَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Njegova smjena počinje u osam uveče i završava ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: His shift starts at eight in the evening and ends in the morning.
He checks the door and monitors the screens.

sentences.arabic: يَنَامُ فِي النَّهَارِ وَيَسْتَيْقِظُ قَبْلَ الْمَسَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Spava danju i budi se prije večeri.
sentences.translationEn: He sleeps during the day and wakes up before evening.
